commands.review_summary:
The PR caps embedded-agent compaction reserve and keep-recent token budgets against a known model context window and updates related tests, docs, and config help text.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +33, Docs +2. Total +50 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection of current main: a 16k context can still leave current reserveTokens at 16,384 and keepRecentTokens at 20,000 because only the floor is capped. The PR adds focused tests for the normalized 8,384 reserve and 8,000 keep-recent result, but I did not run live generation.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR with compatibility-sensitive config semantics; a human reviewer should accept the upgrade behavior and decide whether live small-context proof is required.

target.title: fix(agents): cap compaction budgets for small contexts
target.body:
## Summary

- cap embedded-agent compaction reserve when the known model context window would otherwise leave no usable prompt budget
- cap keep-recent tokens to the prompt budget remaining after reserve for small and mid-sized contexts
- update config help/types to document context-window caps

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts --reporter=dot` - 3 files, 94 tests passed after the final rebase.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts` - passed after the final rebase.
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD` - passed after the final rebase.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean before commit, no accepted/actionable findings.
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` - passed on AWS Crabbox before the last fast-forward drift, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_eaa058a79b49`, run `run_8bac7cd76b73`, exit 0.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: small-context runs no longer retain impossible compaction `reserveTokens` or `keepRecentTokens` budgets when `contextTokenBudget` is known.
Real environment tested: focused local Vitest in a Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: a 16k-context profile resolves to reserve `8,384` and keep-recent `8,000`, configured over-budget values are capped to the available context window, and the changed core/coreTests gate passed remotely.
Observed result after fix: focused tests and changed gate passed; no formatting or whitespace issues.
What was not tested: live Ollama generation for this patch; the changed behavior is the embedded-agent settings normalization layer.
target.author: vincentkoc
